calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-27-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Myrna Lim 415-678-7440 Plaintiff in Pro per.
No other appearances made in this matter.

This matter was contested late. The court received the contest email on Saturday at 8:14 AM. The court has informed the defendant of this issue, and the case will not be heard.

DEFENDANT MYRNA LIM's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.The court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's motion to (1) vacate the default and default judgment entered on February 21, 2025, and (2) dismiss plaintiff's action is DENIED.

On January 10, 2025, Plaintiff filed a proof of service with the court showing that registered process server Gustavo Moreira Machado Lino personally served defendant with a copy of the summons and complaint in this action. "The return of a process server registered pursuant to Chapter 16 (commencing with Section 22350) of Division 8 of the Business and Professions Code upon process or notice establishes a presumption, affecting the burden of producing evidence, of the facts stated in the return." (Evidence Code section 647.) Defendant has not presented any competent evidence to rebut the presumption of proper service. Defendant claims that the summons and complaint were merely posted on her door, but she fails to provide a declaration under penalty of perjury in compliance with CCP 2015.5 or any other competent evidence to support the assertion. Lastly, there is no basis to dismiss plaintiff's action. The court therefore DENIES the motion in its entirety.

Order Signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
